creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
After ports a416ffca6ce6b31318dce4324a4956f9dfd5a152, which disabled lang/guile3 for 32-bit platforms, my poudriere now fails to build even lang/guile2, since its dependency, lang/guile-aclocal is itself dependent on lang/guile3?

I'm not sure how this worked before, but I definitely have both lang/guile2 and lang/guile-aclocal packages from my previous poudriere builds for i386.
